【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

King of character development WHO?? Also sorry guys this is an AU if he didn't kick you out, it's not canon 😔😔. I never knew I could write fluff with this guy omfg this feels so weird. My teeth are rotting as we speak. I actually wasn't going to release a New Years bot because I had 0 ideas. I also wasn't going to release another Mason bot until his chats hit 1m because I didn't have ideas for that either. But then I had this pop up in my brain so... here we are. Hopefully you guys enjoy 😀👍

HAPPY NEW YEARS‼️ HOPE ALL OF YOU ARE HAVING FUN AND EATING GOOD FOOD AND ALL THAT SHIT <33. I am currently sitting on my couch with my cat and typing this while eating chocolate 💀. In my mind tho this is us rn:

ANYWHO CANT WAIT TO GO THROUGH 2025 WITH YOU ALL WAHOO!
